notes.author: codex
notes.text: Reference extension now demonstrates ALL 9 SDK capabilities safely. FIXED two output-corrupting defects in the agent draft: (1) registerService('output_format') returned a fabricated {format} that hijacked EVERY command's output -> changed to true pass-through 'return ctx.payload'; (2) toon/json renderer overrides returned JSON for non-demo payloads -> return null so pm falls through to native rendering. Added 'parser' to manifest capabilities (registerParser requires it). Verified: build+tsc+2/2 tests; functional: extension active, 0 activation/blocking failures; pm list renders native TOON (not corrupted); 'starter demo' uses custom renderer; importer/exporter demo commands run; hooks fire under PM_STARTER_HOOKS.

notes.author: codex
notes.text:
2026-05-29 package-governance/readiness audit evidence.

Required package commands run from repo root: `npm run check`, `npm test`, `npm run pack:dry-run`, and `npm run changelog:check` all exited 0. Logs: `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-npm.log`; summary: `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-npm-summary.tsv`.

Temporary pm CLI flow in `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-flows/pm-starter-cli`: `pm init`, `pm install /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-starter --project`, `pm starter greet --name "Release Auditor" --emoji "[audit]" --uppercase`, `pm create Task ...`, `pm close <id> ...`, `pm starter summary --verbose`, `pm starter-demo import --source realistic-audit --file ./missing-demo.json`, `pm search "Exercise" --json`, `pm list-closed --json`, and `pm package doctor --detail deep --trace` all exited 0. Real workspace item id used for hook/search/list flow: `pm-loy3`.

Observed capability behavior: commands execute and return expected payloads; importer command is exposed as `pm starter-demo import` and runs; preflight and `output_format` service logs appear on real pm commands; doctor reports command paths `starter greet`, `starter summary`, and `starter-demo import`, plus hook/importer/search/service/renderer registrations.

Lifecycle hook caveat: direct SDK harness invocation of registered `afterCreate`/`afterClose` callbacks logs expected hook messages, but real `pm create`/`pm close` did not emit the starter hook messages even though preflight/service logs appeared. This suggests either runtime hook dispatch is not firing for these events or hook output is not surfaced in the real CLI path.

Renderer/search direct harness: default export activation registers renderers `json` and `toon`, search provider `starter-substring`, schema `starter-title-required`, one preflight, and `output_format` service. Direct renderer sample for `json` is TSV and `toon` is a markdown table. CLI `--json` remained valid JSON in the observed list/search commands. README says renderers are `compact` and `markdown-table`, while code registers `json` and `toon`; document or implementation naming should be reconciled before using this as a reference.

Governance: GitHub repo `unbraind/pm-starter` is PUBLIC, unarchived, default branch `main`, latest release `v2026.05.28` published 2026-05-28T23:30:00Z. npm package `pm-starter` latest is `2026.5.28`, repository points at `github.com/unbraind/pm-starter`.

Secret/private-data scan: tracked files and git history were scanned with path-only output for private-key headers, common cloud/GitHub/npm/OpenAI/Slack/Stripe/SendGrid token shapes, generic secret assignments, email literals, and local private host markers. No matches were found. Scan summary: `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-secret-scan.tsv` (empty/no matches).

Write hygiene: no source, package metadata, workflows, or docs were intentionally changed. An npm-driven run dirtied package metadata during verification; it was restored to HEAD. Final remaining changes are limited to `.agents/pm` tracker files.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: 2026-05-29 release-readiness refresh: package manifest/lock now target @unbrained/pm-cli >=2026.5.29 / ^2026.5.29 and pm-changelog ^2026.5.29-2 where applicable. Verified npm run check, npm test, npm run pack:dry-run, npm run audit:prod, npm run changelog:full, npm run changelog:check, npm run release:check, and pm validate. High-confidence worktree/history secret scan recorded no credential-shaped token findings for active package code; nonzero scan rows were classified as placeholders or vendored historical test data where applicable. Logs: /tmp/pm-active-package-gates-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-changelog-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-release-check-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-validate-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-secret-scan-20260529.tsv.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Rewrote README capability table to list all 9 types with exact ExtensionApi calls and registered names (commands: starter greet/summary/demo; renderers: json+toon; hooks: beforeCommand/afterCommand/onWrite/onRead/onIndex; schema: starter_origin/starter_score, StarterNote, pm-starter-0001-noop; importers: pm starter-demo import/export; search: starter-substring + starter-memory vector store; parser/preflight/services pass-through). Documented registerFlags --starter-tag under commands + added zero-runtime-coupling section. Fixed manifest description 8->9. Strengthened smoke test to assert all register*/hook calls fire. build+typecheck+test green; installed into scratch workspace: activated:true, 0 collisions, renderer override + commands verified live.
